---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour in ShopTalk
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Send request '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or unexpected output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.9]
- ShopTalk version: [e.g. 0.2.0 or commit SHA]
- Deployment: [e.g. local dev, Railway, Docker]

## Request / Response (if applicable)

```
# Request
POST /messages/analyze
{
  "text": "..."
}

# Response
{
  "error": "..."
}
```

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here. Screenshots, logs, or related issues are helpful.
